name: Stuffed Artichokes
recipeInstructions:
1. Use six large artichokes.
2. Season one package of bread crumbs (15 oz) with grated Romano cheese and lemon juice.
3. Rinse the prepared artichokes well.
4. Trim the points of leaves about half an inch.
5. Soak the artichokes in cold water.
6. Mix bread crumbs, grated cheese, garlic, and lemon juice; add a small amount of olive oil if needed to hold the mixture together.
7. Stuff each leaf with the breadcrumb mixture, starting from the bottom row.
8. Pack the leaves tightly together.
9. Stand the artichokes upright in a deep pot, ensuring they don't fall over.
10. Drizzle a little olive oil over each artichoke.
11. Add water to cover the artichokes by about two inches; cover the pot and steam until cooked through (check after 30 minutes for tenderness).
